mapper.sql: SELECT p.id, p.student_id, s.name AS student_name, p.enrollment_id, e.course_id, c.name AS course_name, c.instructor_id AS course_instructor_id, p.amount, p.due_date, p.paid_date, p.status, p.created_at, p.updated_at FROM payments p INNER JOIN students s ON p.student_id = s.id INNER JOIN enrollments e ON p.enrollment_id = e.id INNER JOIN courses c ON e.course_id = c.id
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM payments p INNER JOIN enrollments e ON p.enrollment_id = e.id INNER JOIN courses c ON e.course_id = c.id
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO payments ( student_id, enrollment_id, amount, due_date, paid_date, status ) VALUES ( #{studentId}, #{enrollmentId}, #{amount}, #{dueDate}, #{paidDate}, #{status} )
mapper.update: UPDATE payments SET amount = #{amount}, due_date = #{dueDate}, paid_date = #{paidDate}, status = #{status} WHERE id = #{id}
